encounter.reason: Follow-up on social care referral to Rose City Community Services for food insecurity and transportation barriers
encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

document_references.description: Outbound care coordination call by Priya Nair, RN to follow up on social care referral to Rose City Community Services. Patient confirms CBO intake completed, SNAP application in progress, food pantry enrollment active, and TriMet transit voucher information received. Referral task status updated to in-progress. No clinical concerns raised.
